accounts.erp_stack: ~30 ERP systems (mostly SAP ECC 6.0, heavily customized). Multi-year S/4HANA transformation underway (greenfield approach, ~10-year program). 7 small S/4HANA tenants live as of 2020. Target: multi-tenant S/4HANA, 100% cloud end state.

100+ AI applications deployed

C3.ai platform: 2M+ ML models for predictive maintenance
20+ petabytes seismic data in data lake

pain_points: 30 heavily customized legacy SAP systems — siloed between upstream/downstream

Market lacks deep S/4HANA expertise (Shell acknowledged this openly)
20% workforce cut in exploration (Aug 2024) — organizational distraction
Bureaucracy and slow decision-making cited by employees
Political/change management challenges across 70+ country operations

accounts.visit_route: Shell Centre London (Group CIO) → The Hague (IT ops) → Houston (CTO, Shell Energy CIO)
accounts.sap_consulting_opportunity: VERY HIGH — 30 heavily customized legacy SAP systems to rationalize, acknowledged lack of in-house S/4HANA expertise, 10-year program horizon ensures long-term recurring revenue, greenfield approach means full reimplementation, $39.5B FCF provides budget capacity. Shell NEEDS SI partners with S/4HANA depth.
accounts.last30days_sentiment: Generally positive employer (4.0/5). IT transformation criticized for bureaucracy and legacy systems. Layoffs in E&P drew negative Reddit attention but digital/IT functions are being invested in.
